message:
Fix Feedback Wanted workflow permissions

Add pull-requests: write permission required for the reusable
workflow to post comments on merged PRs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ on:
 
 permissions:
   contents: read
+  pull-requests: write
 
 jobs:
   feedback:
